summary: Iteration 16: Complete E2E testing of UI restructuring. All 20 test features passed. Tested Summary page column renames, View Applicants global table (/roles), View Attended Applicants global table (/attended-roles), filters, date formats, and drilldown route removal.

backend: GET /api/applicants returns 200 with correct fields (registered_status, attended_or_not, etc.)
GET /api/applicants date type filter accepts 'Registered' and 'Scheduled'
GET /api/attended without jobRole returns all attended applicants (10 total)
GET /api/attended returns correct columns including score columns in alphabetical order
GET /api/summary returns fields for renamed columns (shortlisted, rejected, scheduled, not_scheduled, attended, not_attended)
frontend: Login with admin/admin - dashboard loads with 3 nav buttons
Summary page: column headers renamed to 'Shortlisted', 'Rejected', 'Interview Scheduled', 'Interview Not Scheduled', 'Attended', 'Not Attended'

View Applicants (/roles): Shows global table with all 12 columns (name, email, phone, college, degree, job_role, registered_status, registered_date, schedule_date, schedule_time, attended_or_not, result_status)
View Applicants: Job Role dropdown filter works (filtered to 'Accountant' showing 2 records)
View Applicants: Date Filter Type dropdown has 'Registered' and 'Scheduled' options
View Applicants: Search bar present and functional
View Applicants: Dates display in DD-MM-YYYY format (e.g., 27-06-2025)
View Applicants: Pagination controls present and working
View Attended Applicants (/attended-roles): Shows global table with ALL 10 attended applicants (no role selection step)
View Attended: All 21 columns present (10 base + 11 score columns)
View Attended: Score columns in alphabetical order (Accounts1, Accounts2, BA, BE, BP, C++, Java, LA, Mensa, Mensa Org, ZA)
View Attended: No Total Score column (as expected)
View Attended: Job Role dropdown filter present
View Attended: Round filter dropdown works with all score options
View Attended: Date range filter present
View Attended: Dates display in DD-MM-YYYY format

seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: 12 registered applicants across 4 job roles, 10 attended applicants
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI restructuring features verified. The app now has: (1) Summary page with renamed columns, (2) View Applicants at /roles showing global table with all registered applicants and filters, (3) View Attended Applicants at /attended-roles showing global table with all attended applicants and score columns in alphabetical order. Old drilldown routes (/roles/:jobRole, /attended/:jobRole) redirect to dashboard. Date format is DD-MM-YYYY throughout. Database has 12 registered and 10 attended applicants.
